title: Capital One Financial Is Still On Sale
text: Capital One Financial Corporation has seen its share price partially recover with announcements such as an investment from Warren Buffett, but it's not overpriced. The company has a respectable 2.3% dividend yield and an aggressive share repurchase program to help out. The company has some risk from rising loss provisions but overall, we expect Capital One Financial Corporation to be able to provide shareholder returns.

title: Before You Buy Capital One, Here's a Bank Stock I'd Buy First
text: Berkshire Hathaway just added Capital One to its portfolio. Another bank stock has some key advantages that stand out in comparison.

title: Capital One: Why Warren Buffett And Michael Burry Are Both Backing Up The Truck
text: Warren Buffett and Michael Burry both loaded up on Capital One stock in Q1. What were they thinking? We dig in. Credit cards are a better business than you think. Capital One made money every year through the 2008 crisis/recession and is poised to easily do the same going forward.

title: Capital One (COF) Aided by Credit Card Business Amid Cost Woes
text: Capital One (COF) will likely witness growth in the top line, supported by higher rates and a solid card business. Elevated costs are expected to hurt profits.

title: New York City Banking Commission votes to freeze Capital One, KeyBank deposits
text: The New York City Banking Commission voted to freeze the city's deposits at Capital One and KeyBank after the banks failed to submit plans on their efforts to root out discrimination.

title: NYC banking commission votes to halt city deposits at Capital One, KeyBank
text: New York City's banking commission voted to freeze deposits at Capital One Financial Corp. COF, +0.43% and KeyCorp's KEY, -0.88% KeyBank after the two banks failed to submit required plans showing their efforts to halt discrimination, the city's comptroller said in a statement on Thursday, alleging that the banks “outright refused to submit required policies.” The comptroller, Brad Lander, also voted against designating Wells Fargo & Co. WFC, +0.07%, PNC Financial Services Group Inc.'s PNC, -1.05% PNC Bank and International Finance Bank to hold public funds, that statement said.

title: Hate Capital One Stock? This Might Change Your Mind
text: This credit card middleman is starting to feel the impact of a weakening economy. The economic headwind it faces, however, is only temporary.

title: Warren Buffett invests nearly $1B in Capital One Financial stock
text: Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE:BRK.A), a company run by billionaire investor Warren Buffett, disclosed on Monday that it now owns 9.92 million shares, or 2.6%, of Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) Corp, an equity stake worth about $954 million. Berkshire revealed its holdings in a regulatory filing listing its US-traded stocks as of March 31, 2023.

title: Bank Stock Enjoys Premarket Pop After Buffett Takes Stake
text: A regulatory filing disclosed Monday shows Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.A) took a roughly $954 million stake in Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE:COF), helping the bank stock rise 6.5% to $94.95 in pre-market trading.

title: Capital One shares up after billionaire investor Buffett's near $1 bln bet on bank
text: Shares of Capital One Financial Corp rose in premarket trading on Tuesday after billionaire investor Warren Buffett's holding company disclosed it had taken a stake in the credit cards-focused bank.
